title: pyrus salviifolia
intro: Pyrus salviifolia, also known as the willow-leaf pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-bacterial properties. The health benefits of Pyrus salviifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pyrus salviifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
